description_long: This house features a two-story main structure with a prominent central entrance, flanked by symmetrical windows and a gabled roof with gray shingles. The facade includes a covered entryway with columns and a set of steps leading to the front door, while the left wing is a single-story extension with its own gabled roof. The right side of the house displays a large brick chimney and a bay window, adding architectural interest. Four tall, conical evergreen trees line the driveway, which leads to a detached garage or auxiliary building on the left. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn, with the rear and side yards featuring striped grass patterns. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with balanced proportions and traditional detailing.
description: A two-story Colonial-style house with a central entry, gabled roofs, brick chimney, bay window, and a detached garage, set on a manicured lawn with evergreen trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, symmetrical windows, driveway, and four tall trees lining the path.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the brick chimney, bay window, and striped lawn extending to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, windowed back facade and the full extent of the striped lawn.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the single-story extension, garage structure, and the row of evergreen trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, columns, and a covered porch
